programme.title: CBS Evening News
programme.desc: Tony Dokoupil shares the day's most important stories, delivering context and depth to bring greater understanding to one's world.

programme.title: CBS News Roundup
programme.desc: The headlines one needs to know overnight... plus, a roundup of MoneyWatch, health, consumer and up-to-the-minute technology news, the latest weather, and inspiring stories of kindness and hope.

programme.desc: CBS News Mornings broadcasts on weekdays and offers viewers up-to-date news, comprehensive weather forecasts, and highlights from the world of sports.

programme.desc: Midday news update.

programme.title: The Young and the Restless
programme.desc: Nick travels down a dangerous path; Cane makes a bold move to help Lily; Holden leans on Claire.

programme.title: The Bold and the Beautiful
programme.desc: Set in the glamorous world of the Los Angeles fashion scene, this soap opera focuses on the wealthy and powerful Forrester family; its company, Forrester Creations, is the leader in the fashion industry.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Joey witnesses an argument, then makes Martin an offer; Vernon gets an important update from Madison; Anita gets a surprise visit from Vanessa; Ashley finds herself stuck between a rock and a hard place; Ren's news causes Jacob and Smitty to panic.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.sub-title: Child Left in a Runaway Car?; Beer and Bones Over the Balcony!
programme.desc: A teacher denies leaving her child in her car, which somehow crashed into a co-worker's vehicle; a landlady accuses a tenant of throwing trash from her balcony.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.sub-title: Yoga Promo Gone Bad!; Broken Tooth Tiff; Happy Dog Reunion!
programme.desc: A woman says a yoga studio owner she met in line at a restaurant gave her $2,000 for used gym equipment; a woman wants her boyfriend to repay her for a loan for dental work; a dog's new owners want to return him after learning he will need surgery.

programme.title: Hot Bench
programme.desc: A damp dispute bubbles up after basement flooding supposedly damages a renter's stored merchandise. The renter claims assurances failed and losses piled up, but the landlord argues swift service, sump pump upgrades and that insurance was the renter's responsibility. When a basement floods, the blame starts flowing!

programme.title: Hot Bench
programme.desc: A man says he paid six months' rent and moved in his belongings, only to be shut out and left with nothing; the homeowner denies receiving payment and claims the tenant made him uncomfortable.

programme.desc: Evening news coverage.

programme.sub-title: A Country Club, a Yokel and a New Boss

programme.desc: The team confronts an unexpected final hurdle they need to overcome to bring Senior to justice for his role in the Wellbrexa cover-up; the team defends an airport ramp operator accused of safety negligence in the death of a passenger.

programme.title: The Young and the Restless
programme.desc: Victor makes Phyllis a deal she can't refuse; Adam pushes Riza to come clean; Sharon and Noah are ambushed in Vegas.

programme.title: The Bold and the Beautiful
programme.desc: Set in the glamorous world of the Los Angeles fashion scene, this soap opera focuses on the wealthy and powerful Forrester family; its company, Forrester Creations, is the leader in the fashion industry.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Chelsea questions Bill about Hayley; Dani and Naomi comfort each other; Jan's presence stresses Ashley out; Nicole and Carlton reconcile just as Kial swings by; Vanessa makes herself at home in Joey's condo.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.sub-title: The Tattoo Artist's Apprentice; Casanova Dodges Payback?
programme.desc: A tattoo artist resists returning an apprenticeship fee, saying the apprentice was a slacker; a man accused of having a secret girlfriend is sued by his ex for repayment of a loan.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.sub-title: When Ex-Girlfriends Fight!; Burning Down the Condo!
programme.desc: A woman says she had to bathe at a restaurant and sleep in a car after her ex locked her out; a landlady blames her tenant for a fire in his condo, but he passes the buck on to his friend, who was smoking a cigar.

programme.title: Hot Bench
programme.desc: A man says his ex-wife's nephew slashed his tires, costing him a day of work, but the nephew says the plaintiff made up the story to avoid paying for a washer and dryer.

programme.title: Hot Bench
programme.desc: A woman in need of a fresh start moved into her sponsor's house, but when her son misbehaved, the sponsor's husband reprimanded him, and the arrangement quickly fell apart; the defendants are accused of withholding access to her remaining belongings.

programme.title: Sheriff Country
programme.desc: While Skye celebrates her 24th birthday, Sheriff Mickey Fox investigates a brutal attack tied to a land-grab scheme.

programme.title: Fire Country
programme.desc: Bode sets out to prove his leadership skills during a historic cold snap that plunges Edgewater into crisis mode; Jake contemplates a life-altering decision that could change his future forever.

Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Boston Blue
programme.desc: When a crisis erupts at a local hospital over a critical transplant error, Danny and Lena work to calm a volatile situation; an unexpected encounter pushes Lena to reflect on her past.

programme.title: CBS News New York 11pm
programme.desc: Local news coverage.

programme.title: The Late Show With Stephen Colbert
programme.desc: Improv actor and comic Stephen Colbert flexes the hosting muscles he honed over nearly 1,500 episodes of the popular and critically celebrated "The Colbert Report" at the helm of this long-running late-night talk show. Following the genre's classic formula, each show kicks off with a monologue and a look at recent headlines, and features sketch comedy, celebrity interviews and musical performances. Joining Colbert is his bandleader, Julliard-trained Jon Batiste, and house band Stay Human. The show is filmed in New York's famed Ed Sullivan Theater, the longtime home of "The Late Show.".

programme.title: Comics Unleashed With Byron Allen
programme.sub-title: Chantel Rae; Shang; Harrison Greenbaum; Nate Craig
programme.desc: Chantel Rae; Shang; Harrison Greenbaum; Nate Craig.
